steps.title: Find the upper bound
steps.content:
The third side must be less than the sum of the other two sides:
$$
x<9+14
$$
$$
x<23
$$

steps.title: Find the lower bound
steps.content:
The third side must also be greater than the difference of the other two sides:
$$
x>|14-9|
$$
$$
x>5
$$

steps.title: Combine the bounds
steps.content: Together, the possible side lengths satisfy $$ 5C.
